历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 235 → 302 → 256 → 236 → 213, with overall fluctuations between 213 and 302. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 213, the best level in the past five years, indicating a continuously rising application popularity.
From 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 20 students each year, increasing to 21 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 33 students, a 57% increase from 2025, marking the largest expansion in recent years. This will notably increase admission slots, but as a top-tier university, Fudan's expansion may attract more high-scoring applicants, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 6th in the 2021 Soft Science Main Ranking, and consistently 5th from 2022 to 2026, indicating a national top-tier level. In 2025, reputation evaluation was relatively positive (e.g., Journalism and Communication A++ and other research achievements). In 2026, reputation turned somewhat negative (incidents related to teacher ethics and school management), but overall attention remains high. Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity exceeding tens of millions, reflecting extremely high application interest. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were signals of admission score fluctuations in 2021–2022, but no significant gaps have been observed in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are as many as 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Biology A+, Political Science A+, Journalism and Communication A+, and Marxist Theory A+, showcasing national top-tier academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Fudan's Physics Category admission majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class, Mathematics Class, etc.). In 2025, Liaoning Province had 143,368 Physics Category examinees, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is approximately 200,000 (estimated at about 144,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of ~72%), indicating a stable candidate pool. The provincial control line (special type enrollment control line) from 2021 to 2025 was 503 → 501 → 494 → 510 → 515, showing a steady upward trend. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Liaoning candidates. In the university's national total enrollment, Liaoning's share is approximately 3–8%, considered moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 baseline ranking of 213 is the best in five years, the significant 57% expansion in 2026 will notably increase admission slots but may attract more high-scoring applicants, the university's top-tier level and strong advantageous disciplines continue to attract high-quality students, Douyin's high heat reflects extremely high application interest, and the overall impact of reputation incidents is limited, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 300, with a range of 250–350.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics Intelligence Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Academy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Innovation Academy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Materials and Future Energy Leading Talent Class)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Digital Twin).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 250–350, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 250), you can aim for flagship programs like Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan/Xianghui Plan. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 350), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Future Information Innovation Academy and Smart Materials to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 53 → 68 → 101 → 69 → 61 respectively. In 2023, the ranking moved back to 101, but quickly recovered to 69/61 in 2024–2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 61, indicating a recovery in application popularity to a relatively high level. From 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plans for History Category were 8, 8, 9, and 8 respectively, reduced to 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8, an increase of 14.3% compared to 2025, a small change with limited impact on competition. 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 6th in the main list of Soft Science in 2021, and steadily ranked 5th from 2022 to 2026, at the national top level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2025, the reputation evaluation was relatively positive (e.g., Journalism and Communication A++ and other research achievements). In 2026, the reputation was relatively negative (incidents related to teacher ethics and school management), but overall attention remains high. Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity exceeding tens of millions. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were signals of admission score fluctuations in 2021–2022, but no obvious gaps in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are as many as 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including directly related to History Category enrollment majors: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Chinese History A+, Sociology A, Law A-, etc., with discipline strength at the national top level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors continue to be recommended. Although Journalism and Communication has been significantly discouraged due to the Zhang Xuefeng incident, Fudan's top A+ status in Journalism and Communication still holds appeal. In 2025, Liaoning Province had 56,324 History Category examinees, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is approximately 200,000 (estimated at about 56,000 for History Category based on the recent proportion of about 28%), with a basically stable examinee scale. The provincial control line (special type enrollment control line) from 2021 to 2025 was 534 → 500 → 495 → 510 → 522 points, showing a fluctuating but slightly rising trend. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Liaoning examinees. The proportion of Liaoning in the university's total national enrollment scale is about 3–8%, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 61 being a relatively high level in recent years, the limited impact of the small 14.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, the top-tier school level and strong liberal arts advantageous disciplines continuing to attract high-quality students, the high Douyin heat reflecting extremely high application attention, and the limited overall impact of reputation incidents, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 70, with a range of 20–120.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics Top Class)
- Journalism and Communication (Wangdao Journalism Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other History Category enrollment majors (only 3 enrollment majors for History Category in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 20–120, since there are only 3 enrollment majors in History Category, all of which are Fudan's top liberal arts majors, those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., 20–40) can prioritize Economics (Mathematical Economics Top Class). Those with rankings in the middle range (40–80) can consider Humanities Experimental Class or Journalism and Communication. Those with rankings near the upper limit (80–120) still have a chance of admission and are advised to fill in the application order reasonably.
